column.text:
• Atlanta Braves placed RHP Spencer Strider on the 15-day injured list with right elbow inflammation.
• Detroit Tigers placed RHP Jack Flaherty on the 15-day injured list with a left peroneal strain.
• Texas Rangers placed CF Evan Carter on the 10-day injured list with a right oblique strain.
• Texas Rangers designated RHP Michel Otañez for assignment.
• New York Yankees placed CF Trent Grisham on the 10-day injured list with a right hamstring strain.
• Pittsburgh Pirates recalled RHP Isaac Mattson from Triple-A Indianapolis Indians.
• Detroit Tigers recalled 2B Hao-Yu Lee from Triple-A Toledo Mud Hens.
• New York Yankees activated LF Jasson Domínguez from the 10-day injured list.
• Detroit Tigers activated LHP Tarik Skubal from the 15-day injured list.
• Chicago White Sox sent RHP Jordan Hicks on a rehab assignment to Charlotte Knights.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
